description: Test cases for evaluating the prd-writer Skill across different scenarios — from zero, with upstream materials, with size variants, and edge cases.

evals.name: from-scratch-individual-project
evals.prompt: 我有个想法：做一个 7×24 帮我盯 A 股的 AI 助手，能盯自选股、扫全市场异动、每天给我一份个性化早盘简报、关键时刻主动推送。请帮我写一份 PRD。
evals.expected_output: A 14-chapter PRD or properly auto-selected size variant. Should include all required chapters (1-7, 9-11, 13). Must contain Given/When/Then acceptance criteria. Must not include technical stack details (React, Postgres, etc.). Must have In-Scope and Out-of-Scope. Must have specific user persona including anti-persona.

assertions.description: Contains 14 standard chapters or properly auto-recommended subset
Does not specify technology stacks, frameworks, or libraries
Section 3 includes anti-persona (explicit 'who we don't serve')
Performance/quality requirements include specific numbers (not 'should be fast')

evals.name: with-upstream-brainstorming-doc
evals.prompt: 我有一份 brainstorming-design.md 已经决定了：做一个面向小团队的内部知识管理工具，主要功能是文档检索 + AI 问答 + 权限控制。请基于这个 design doc 生成标准 PRD。
evals.expected_output: Skill should ask if it can read the design doc first (if not provided as file). Once context is established, generates 14-chapter PRD properly referencing the upstream decisions. Should NOT redo brainstorming work.

assertions.description: Skill respects upstream brainstorming decisions, does not redo discovery
If material not provided, skill asks for it instead of fabricating
Output has 14-chapter (or auto-selected smaller variant) structure

evals.name: minimal-version-1-week-project
evals.prompt: 我是 1 人项目，1 周内要交付一个内部 CLI 工具，把团队的会议录音自动转文字+总结。请用极简版写 PRD。
evals.expected_output: Skill should recommend the 5-chapter minimal version (chapters 2, 5, 6, 9, 13). Should be concise but cover essentials.

assertions.description: Even minimal version retains acceptance criteria (chapter 9)
Even minimal version retains open questions/risks (chapter 13)
Total PRD length appropriate for 1-week project (not over-engineered)

evals.name: boundary-test-rejects-tech-detail
evals.prompt: 帮我写一份 PRD：做一个网页端任务管理工具，用 React + TypeScript + PostgreSQL，部署在 Vercel 上，数据库用 Prisma ORM。
evals.expected_output: Skill should accept the request BUT clarify that technical stack details (React/TypeScript/PostgreSQL/Vercel/Prisma) will NOT be included in the PRD. It should explain the What/How boundary and offer to capture them in a separate TRD note instead.

assertions.description: Final PRD does not mention React, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Vercel, or Prisma as design decisions
Skill explains the What/How boundary to user, why tech stack belongs in TRD
Skill offers to capture tech stack in a separate TRD or constraint section, doesn't just discard

evals.name: edge-case-no-upstream-vague-idea
evals.expected_output: Skill must refuse to immediately write a PRD. Should engage in Socratic Q&A to surface: what kind of app, for whom, what problem, MVP scope, success criteria. Only after sufficient information is gathered should it produce PRD draft.

assertions.description: Does not generate a PRD from a one-sentence vague idea
Asks at least 5 discovery questions about user, problem, scope, success
May suggest doing brainstorming/research first if idea is too raw
